CineTestPage.meta_description: Answer 48 quick, film-first questions and uncover the cinema persona behind how you watch, feel, and choose.
CineTestPage.page_1_subtitle: A few quick reads on how you watch.
CineTestPage.page_2_subtitle: More on how you think, feel, and choose.
CineTestPage.page_4_subtitle: Now the fun part — what you actually love to watch.
CineTestPage.intro_description: CineTest reads how you watch, feel, and choose films and maps it to a cinema persona. The questions are quick and film-first — no right or wrong answers, just your honest taste.
CineTestPage.intro_step_1: Answer 48 short questions across 4 quick steps.
CineTestPage.intro_step_2: Rate statements, choose what you'd do, and pick the films and people you love.
CineTestPage.intro_step_3: Get your cinema persona with a breakdown of your taste.
CineTestPage.intro_meta: Takes about 5 minutes · your progress is saved
CineTestPage.submit_error: Could not score your test. Check your connection and submit again.
CineTestPage.incomplete_hint: Answer every question on this page to continue.
CineTestPage.browse_error: The film catalogue is unavailable right now.
CineTestPage.feature_axes_desc: Every answer feeds a hidden eight-axis read on how you watch, feel, and choose.
CineTestPage.feature_personas_desc: Your traits resolve to one of sixteen distinct film personalities.
CineTestPage.feature_films_desc: Rate statements and pick films straight from the catalogue — it's about taste, not trivia.
CineTestPage.feature_recs_desc: Leave with a set of films hand-matched to your profile.
CineTestPage.landing_cta_title: Ready to meet your cinema persona?
CineTestPage.landing_cta_description: It takes about five minutes, and there are no wrong answers.
CineTestPage.monthly_note: You can take the test once a month.
CineTestPage.cooldown_title: You've already taken the test this month
CineTestPage.cooldown_description: You can take it again on {date}.
CineTestPage.cooldown_toast: You can retake the test on {date}. Here's your latest result.

CineTest.q01_text: I'd rather watch a film with other people than on my own.
CineTest.q02_text: I watch films mostly for what they're trying to say.
CineTest.q03_text: I notice a film's craft — the camerawork, editing, and direction.
CineTest.q04_text: I'd rather watch something new than something I already know I'll like.
CineTest.q05_text: I prefer films that move fast and keep the energy up.
CineTest.q06_text: I'm drawn to films set in imaginative or fantastical worlds.
CineTest.q07_text: I'm drawn to dark, heavy, emotionally intense films.
CineTest.q08_text: I like a film that leaves its ending open to interpretation.
CineTest.q09_text: I enjoy films most when I watch them completely alone.
CineTest.q10_text: I watch mainly for the experience — the thrills, not the themes.
CineTest.q11_text: I judge a film mostly by how it makes me feel.
CineTest.q12_text: I'd rather rewatch a favorite than risk a film I don't know.
CineTest.q13_text: I love a slow-burn film that takes its time.
CineTest.q14_text: I prefer stories grounded in everyday reality.
CineTest.q15_text: I gravitate toward light, feel-good films.
CineTest.q16_text: I prefer films that tie everything up by the end.
CineTest.q17_text: Talking a film over afterward is half the fun for me.
CineTest.q18_text: I look for deeper meaning and themes in what I watch.
CineTest.q19_text: I quickly notice technique and how a film is put together.
CineTest.q20_text: I love exploring cinema from countries and eras new to me.
CineTest.q21_text: A film that drags loses me — I want pace and momentum.
CineTest.q23_text: I don't mind a film that leaves me shaken.
CineTest.q25_text: How do you usually land on what to watch tonight?
CineTest.q25_a: I message someone so we can watch it together.
CineTest.q25_b: I look for something with real ideas to chew on.
CineTest.q25_c: I pick something whose craft I want to study.
CineTest.q25_d: I hunt for something I've never seen before.
CineTest.q26_text: A film festival is on. Which screening calls to you?
CineTest.q26_b: A surreal trip into an imagined world.
CineTest.q26_c: An intense, harrowing story that doesn't flinch.
CineTest.q26_d: One famous for its ambiguous, unresolved ending.
CineTest.q27_text: Your ideal movie night looks most like…
CineTest.q27_a: Alone, phone off, just me and the screen.
CineTest.q27_b: Pure spectacle — something to feel, not analyze.
CineTest.q27_c: A film that goes straight for the heart.
CineTest.q27_d: A trusted favorite I already love.
CineTest.q28_text: After a long week, what do you reach for?
CineTest.q28_a: A slow, quiet film I can sink into.
CineTest.q28_d: A story that ties everything up neatly.
CineTest.q29_text: What makes a movie night memorable for you?
CineTest.q29_a: Sharing it and talking it over with people after.
CineTest.q29_b: Catching the clever details and craft others missed.
CineTest.q29_d: Something intense that leaves a mark.
CineTest.q30_text: Which kind of film stays with you longest?
CineTest.q30_a: One with themes I can keep unpacking.
CineTest.q30_b: One unlike anything I'd seen before.
CineTest.q30_c: One with a strange, dreamlike world.
CineTest.q30_d: One that leaves its ending wide open.
CineTest.q31_text: Pick the night that sounds best:
CineTest.q31_b: A film that moves me to tears.
CineTest.q32_text: Friends ask what to watch. You suggest…
CineTest.q32_b: A classic I know never misses.
CineTest.q32_d: A satisfying film with a clear ending.
CineTest.q33_text: What pulls you toward a film the most?
CineTest.q33_a: The chance to experience it with others.
CineTest.q33_c: The promise of pace and adrenaline.
CineTest.q34_text: Which one-line review makes you press play?
CineTest.q34_a: "A masterclass in craft — every choice is deliberate."
CineTest.q34_c: "Relentless and intense from the first frame."
CineTest.q34_d: "I'm still arguing about what it meant."
CineTest.q35_text: On a quiet Sunday, you'd rather…
CineTest.q35_b: A big, fun spectacle to get lost in.
CineTest.q36_text: What do you value most in a film?
CineTest.q36_a: That it makes me feel something real.
CineTest.q36_b: Knowing roughly what I'm getting into.
CineTest.q37_text: Pick your four all-time favorite films.
CineTest.q37_sub: The four you'd save above all others.
CineTest.q38_text: A film you loved — except for the ending.
CineTest.q38_sub: It pulled you in, then the last act let you down.
CineTest.q39_text: The film with the best ending you've ever seen.
CineTest.q39_sub: An ending that landed exactly the way it needed to.
CineTest.q40_text: Your guilty pleasure — bad on paper, fun every time.
CineTest.q40_sub: "I know it's not good, but I love it."
CineTest.q41_text: A film you never wanted to end.
CineTest.q41_sub: You wanted to stay inside its world a little longer.
CineTest.q42_text: A film you didn't get years ago but would see differently now.
CineTest.q42_sub: Time changed what it means to you.
CineTest.q43_text: The first film you'd show someone to make them love cinema.
CineTest.q44_text: A film that takes you back to your childhood.
CineTest.q44_sub: The one that smells like home when you hear the score.
CineTest.q45_text: A film whose score you'd listen to on its own.
CineTest.q45_sub: The music outlived the credits for you.
CineTest.q46_text: A film universe you'd want to live in.
CineTest.q46_sub: The world you'd happily move into.
CineTest.q47_text: A director whose every film you'd watch on sight.
CineTest.q47_sub: Name alone is enough — you're in.
CineTest.q48_text: An actor or actress you most see yourself in.
CineTest.q48_sub: Whose presence on screen feels closest to you.

CineTestResultPage.traits_intro: How you lean across the eight axes — the center means balanced.
CineTestResultPage.affinity_intro: The personas your taste sits nearest to.
CineTestResultPage.signup_description: Sign up to keep your type on your profile, track films, and retake the test each month.
CineTestResultPage.highlights_intro: The choices that pushed your persona the furthest.
CineTestResultPage.films_intro: The films you chose along the way.
CineTestResultPage.recommendations_intro: Hand-picked from the genres that match your profile.
CineTestResultPage.descriptor_balanced: You move fluidly between extremes — a versatile, hard-to-box-in viewer.
CineTestResultPage.descriptor_tempo_high: You like your films fast and propulsive — momentum that never lets up.
CineTestResultPage.descriptor_tempo_low: You savor a slow burn — films that take their time and let tension simmer.
CineTestResultPage.descriptor_palette_high: You're drawn to the fantastical — imagined worlds, the surreal, the larger than life.
CineTestResultPage.descriptor_palette_low: You prefer films grounded in reality — true to life and close to the bone.
CineTestResultPage.descriptor_mood_high: You lean into darkness — tension, dread, and films that don't flinch.
CineTestResultPage.descriptor_mood_low: You gravitate to warmth and lightness, films that leave you lifted.
CineTestResultPage.descriptor_ending_high: You embrace ambiguity and open endings that linger and provoke.
CineTestResultPage.descriptor_ending_low: You like a story that resolves — order, clarity, and a clean close.
